Our Safety First Framework

How We Build a Culture of Safety

SimRisk believes that safety is not a compliance checkbox — it is a lived culture, embedded in every aspect of your operations.

📚

Education

Equipping your teams with the knowledge and skills to recognise hazards and respond effectively before incidents occur.

🎯

Awareness

Creating a workplace culture where every individual understands their role in maintaining a safe environment.

🔬

Innovation

Leveraging simulation-based learning to deliver realistic, impactful training that prepares teams for real-world emergencies.

Why Choose SimRisk

Practical Experience Meets Innovative Learning

Drawing on years of hands-on workplace safety, compliance, and risk management experience, SimRisk was established with one mission: to save lives through education, awareness, and simulation-based learning.

  • ✓

    Specialist HSE Consultancy — facility, site, and workplace safety consulting tailored to your environment.

  • ✓

    OHS Compliance — ensuring your organisation meets all legal Health & Safety obligations.

  • ✓

    Simulation Training — immersive, scenario-based training that builds real competence.

  • ✓

    Risk Assessments — identifying hazards before they become incidents.


⚠️

The Cost of Not Acting

Non-compliance with OHS regulations can result in severe penalties, operational shutdowns, and — most critically — the loss of human life.

SimRisk helps you stay ahead of risk, not react to it.

Take the First Step

Who We Are

About SimRisk

A specialist Health, Safety and Risk Management initiative committed to protecting people and organisations.

Our Story

Founded on a Mission to Save Lives

SimRisk was founded in 2021 as a specialist Health, Safety and Risk Management initiative operating under Space Entity.

Drawing on years of practical experience in workplace safety, compliance, and risk management, SimRisk was established with a simple mission: to save lives through education, awareness, and innovative simulation-based learning.

We believe that every preventable incident is one too many. Our approach combines rigorous compliance consulting with forward-thinking simulation training to build the safety cultures that workplaces need — not just the paperwork they are required to produce.

🏢

Space Entity

SimRisk operates as a specialist initiative under Space Entity, bringing dedicated focus to HSE consulting, risk management, and simulation training.

Established 2021 · Johannesburg, South Africa

Our Mission

"To save lives through education, awareness, and innovative simulation-based learning."

What Drives Us

Our Core Values

🛡️ Safety Above All

Every recommendation, every training programme, and every assessment is guided by one non-negotiable principle: safety first.

📖 Continuous Learning

We equip individuals and organisations with the knowledge to stay safe today and adapt to new risks tomorrow.

🤝 Integrity

We provide honest, independent assessments — even when the findings are difficult to hear.

💡 Innovation

Simulation-based learning that goes beyond the classroom, creating real-world competence through immersive experience.

⚖️ Compliance

We help you meet your legal obligations under the Occupational Health and Safety Act and related regulations.

❤️ Purpose

We are in this business to prevent harm. Every engagement is driven by the belief that no workplace incident is inevitable.

What We Offer

Our Services

Comprehensive Health, Safety, and Risk Management solutions built for facilities that take safety seriously. Click any card to learn more.

📋

HSE OHS Compliance

Click to learn more

Tap to flip ↺

Why OHS Compliance Matters

Occupational Health and Safety compliance is not just a legal obligation — it is the foundation of a safe, productive workplace. Non-compliance exposes organisations to regulatory penalties, litigation, reputational damage, and most importantly, preventable harm to employees.

SimRisk helps you understand your OHS obligations, identify gaps, and implement compliant systems that protect your business and your people.

🏗️

HSE Consultancy

Click to learn more

Tap to flip ↺

Expert HSE Consulting Services

Our consultants deliver practical, on-the-ground support across a range of environments:

• Facility HSE Consulting — Reviewing your facility's safety systems and infrastructure

• Site HSE Consulting — On-site assessments and hazard identification for active work sites

• Workplace HSE Consulting — Building day-to-day safety cultures and operational protocols

🔍

Risk Assessment

Click to learn more

Tap to flip ↺

Identifying Risk Before It Becomes Incident

A thorough risk assessment is the single most effective tool in preventing workplace injuries and fatalities. It identifies hazards, evaluates their likelihood and impact, and prioritises the controls needed to eliminate or reduce them.

SimRisk conducts professional risk assessments tailored to your industry, providing clear, actionable findings and a prioritised remediation roadmap.

🎓

Training

Click to learn more

Tap to flip ↺

Simulation-Based Safety Training

Real safety competence is built through practice, not just classroom theory. SimRisk delivers:

• Risk Assessment Training — Empowering your team to identify and manage hazards independently

• Emergency Procedure Training — Realistic simulation exercises that prepare your people to respond confidently when it matters most

Simulation-based learning for lasting competence.
